html:
Exclusive to:

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Pearl's Light Post is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the decoration score reaches 10 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 5 points. It can only be built within the Crabby Hermit's area.

The Light Post has 1 slot and the player can put Light Bulb, Glow Berry, Lesser Glow Berry, Mushroom Spores, Festive Lights, Crustashines or Enlightened Shards to light the area. The lights also act like an Ice Box and slow down the spoilage of the items put inside by 75%, extending the spoilage time by four times.

Building a Pearl's Light Post within 2 Tile radius of another Light Post, Hermit Home, or Pearl's Tea Shop can make them connect together. The Light Post and its connecting lights can light up 1.25 Tile radius.

Seaside Spoils

If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, Pearl's Light Post at the original location will turn into Seaside Spoils and can no longer be used. Even if Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Light Post will remain abandoned and cannot be used.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Event skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.
Event
The Merrymaker Collection
n/a
n/a

Trivia

  • There is mention of "Pearl's Light Post Kit" in game files.

“They really lighten the mood.”
–Wilson
“I love a warm glow.”
–Willow
“Pretty lights bring out Wolfgang eyes.”
–Wolfgang
“A bit of light in the darkness.”
–Wendy
“FLESHSACKS ARE ALWAYS AFRAID OF THE DARK”
–WX-78
“It illuminates the space nicely.”
–Wickerbottom
“Wish I had those around the cabin.”
–Woodie
“Hmph. I hope she appreciates this.”
–Maxwell
“It döth shine with the radiance öf Baldur.”
–Wigfrid
“Bright and cheery!”
–Webber
“Ah. Lovely!”
–Warly
“Pretty bright”
–Wormwood
“Oh that's real pretty.”
–Winona
“How can I feel low with such a pretty glow?”
–Wortox
“Make crabby lady house pretty. Glurph!”
–Wurt
“I hope Ms. Pearl likes it!”
–Walter
“What a cheery sight.”
–Wanda

–Willow
“This is too bad.”
–Wolfgang
“The light could not last.”
–Wendy
“HA”
–WX-78
“The remnants of a lighting apparatus.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's just garbage now.”
–Woodie
“That's depressing.”
–Maxwell
“It is nö möre.”
–Wigfrid
“Awww...”
–Webber
“How sad!”
–Warly
“Oh no”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' lasts forever, I suppose.”
–Winona
“A shame it all ends the same.”
–Wortox
“Too bad, glurgh.”
–Wurt
“Aw, I don't think we can fix that.”
–Walter
“Oh botheration, what a mess.”
–Wanda

title: Pearl's Light Post

Glurph! |walter = I hope Ms. Pearl likes it! |wanda = What a cheery sight. |choose = walter }} '''Pearl's Light Post''' is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the [[Crabby Hermit#Decoration|decoration score]] reaches 10 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 5 points. It can only be built within the [[Crabby Hermit]]'s area. The Light Post has 1 slot and the player can put {{DSTL|Light Bulb}}, {{DSTL|Glow Berry}}, [[Lesser Glow Berry]], [[Mushroom Spore]]s, [[Festive Lights]], [[Crustashine]]s or [[Enlightened Shard]]s to light the area. The lights also act like an [[Ice Box]] and slow down the spoilage of the items put inside by 75%, extending the spoilage time by four times. Building a Pearl's Light Post within 2 [[Tile]] radius of another Light Post, [[Hermit Home]], or [[Pearl's Tea Shop]] can make them connect together. The Light Post and its connecting lights can light up 1.25 Tile radius. {{clear}} == Seaside Spoils == {{Object Infobox |name = Seaside Spoils |image = Seaside Spoils Build.png |deconstruct ={{pic32|Rocks}}×3 {{pic32|Barnacles}}×2 {{pic32|Broken Shell (DST)}}×2 |tool = Can be [[Tools#Hammering_Tools|Hammered]] {{pic|32|Hammer}} |structure = Yes |spawnCode = "hermitcrab_lightpost_abandoned" }}{{Quotes |wilson = It's so sad, I can't stand it. |willow = What'dya I can't burn it?! |wolfgang = This is too bad. |wendy = The light could not last. |wx78 = HA |wickerbottom = The remnants of a lighting apparatus. |woodie = It's just garbage now. |maxwell = That's depressing. |wigfrid = It is nö möre. |webber = Awww... |winona = Nothin' lasts forever, I suppose. |warly = How sad! |wortox = A shame it all ends the same. |wormwood = Oh no |wurt = Too bad, glurgh. |walter = Aw, I don't think we can fix that. |wanda = Oh botheration, what a mess. |choose = webber }} If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, Pearl's Light Post at the original location will turn into '''Seaside Spoils''' and can no longer be used. Even if Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Light Post will remain abandoned and cannot be used. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Natural Object Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Event''' skin does not drop normally.
